MCM Stark Visetos
Large nail backpack
dp exclusive®️ classic cognac
Officially medium size. This season's Stark backpack is a reinterpretation of the MCM classic. Made of our signature Visetos coated canvas, with luxurious faux leather lining. Structured design with spacious interior and pyramid nail trim to add a bold style to your look.

Dimensions: 42.5*16*33.5cm
Color: Cognac/Brown

items.name_en: MCM Stark Visetos
items.name_cn:
MCM Stark Visetos
Bebe Boo Rivet Backpack
dp Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
Officially called X mini# This is a miniature version of the classic MCM. We use the iconic Visetos coated canvas with a luxurious faux leather lining and riveted trim. The item fits various looks; the innovative design allows the strap to instantly transform it into a crossbody bag, backpack, shoulder bag, waist bag, and handbag. Show off your new style with this extra-mini Stark backpack.
Model: MMK6SVE92CO001
Size: 21*10*17.5cm
Color: Cognac/Brown

items.name_en: MCM Stark Visetos
items.name_cn:
MCM Stark Visetos
Mini Rivet Backpack
dp Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
Officially called mini# This classic Stark backpack features the iconic Visetos pattern and Nappa leather, a pioneer in the daily luxury field. Multi-faceted rivets outline the silhouette of the bag, embodying MCM's unique rebellious spirit. The bag features an outer pocket, a front zip pocket, and an internal compartment for tablets and small electronics, showcasing modern functionality that complements its contemporary look.
Model: MMK6SVE37CO001
Size: 26*10.5*21.5cm
Color: Cognac/Brown

items.name_en: Style No.6827 🪡MCM👜 New TRACY Vintage Flap Handbag/Crossbody: Simple and sharp lines, minimalist versatile shape, creating a refined look... Classic MCM pattern elements present a unique layered visual effect. Designed for daily wear or quick trips, the lightweight shape. Laurel lock, high-profile interpretation of MCM identity, unique retro style. Equipped with an adjustable shoulder strap, lightweight and convenient, changing different looks. items.name_en: Style No.6821- Summer New 🌷MCM🌷 Original Patricia Visetos Mini Saddle Bag. This Patricia shoulder bag is a 🌷MCM🌷 classic, based on the classic Patty style, combining Bauhaus-inspired design and craftsmanship, showcasing 🌷MCM🌷's excellent heritage in making luxury goods. The bag front is decorated with a shiny laurel lock, an ideal choice for creating a charming look. Dimensions: 7 x 18 x 18

items.name_en: Style No.6411.
items.name_cn:
Style No.6411.
✨MCM✨ This Dessau drawstring bag is named after a historically 📝 significant center for Bauhaus design. The bag features a classic style that integrates form and function, paying tribute to the famous art movement. The classic Visetos🌷 pattern combined with Nappa leather🐂 showcases the charm of traditional craftsmanship. Inside hides a detachable classic pattern clutch, which can be used as an independent 👝 wallet. The included leather handle and adjustable🐂 leather shoulder strap make this bag elegant and versatile. Dimensions: 26x22x13
